subcodes.first_line: O family of the glorious and noble Uncle! That exalted Uncle is seated upon the throne of truth in the presence of the omnipotent King [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خاندان حضرت عم بزرگوار عم جلیل بر سریر مقعد صدق عند ملیک مقتدر جالس و
subcodes.subjects: @youth and pre-ministry of Abdu'l-Baha, @eulogies; reminiscences, @praise and encouragement
